# Context Kernel v0.1.13

This release adds manual MCP tool invocation with traceability.

## Highlights

- Added `akernel mcp call <server> <tool>`.
- Supports JSON object arguments via `--args`.
- Calls stdio MCP `tools/call`.
- Records results as `mcp_call` tool traces in `.akernel/tool_traces`.

## Note

Automatic agent-side MCP calls are still intentionally gated. Manual calls provide the auditable bridge needed before agent policy automation.

## Validation

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
